question_text: In the monopoly graph shown below, read the profit-maximizing quantity marker.

answer_key.explanation: The vertical mark Q* is placed at quantity 40.

visual.caption: Monopoly diagram with AR, MR, MC and quantity marker.
visual.altText: AR and MR are downward sloping while MC is horizontal. A vertical-line style mark labelled Q* indicates the quantity at MR-MC intersection.
